info.title: Klaviyo API
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
Get all coupons in an account. To learn more, see our [Coupons API guide](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/use_klaviyos_coupons_api).

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupons:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_coupons.json)

Get a specific coupon with the given coupon ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupons:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_coupon.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal id of a Coupon is equivalent to its external id stored within an integration.

schema.description: The internal id of a Coupon is equivalent to its external id stored within an integration.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal id of a Coupon is equivalent to its external id stored within an integration.

schema.description: The internal id of a Coupon is equivalent to its external id stored within an integration.

delete.description:
Delete the coupon with the given coupon ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `coupons:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/delete_coupon.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The internal id of a Coupon is equivalent to its external id stored within an integration.

schema.description: The internal id of a Coupon is equivalent to its external id stored within an integration.

get.description:
Gets a list of coupon codes associated with a coupon/coupons or a profile/profiles. A coupon/coupons or a profile/profiles must be provided as required filter params.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `350/s`
Steady: `3500/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_coupon_codes.json)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`expires_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`status`: `equals`
`coupon.id`: `any`, `equals`
`profile.id`: `any`, `equals`

post.description:
Synchronously creates a coupon code for the given coupon.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `350/s`
Steady: `3500/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/create_coupon_code.json)

get.description:
Returns a Coupon Code specified by the given identifier.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `350/s`
Steady: `3500/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_coupon_code.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of a coupon code is a combination of its unique code and the id of the coupon it is associated with.

schema.description: The id of a coupon code is a combination of its unique code and the id of the coupon it is associated with.

patch.description:
Updates a coupon code specified by the given identifier synchronously. We allow updating the 'status' and 'expires_at' of coupon codes.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `350/s`
Steady: `3500/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/update_coupon_code.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of a coupon code is a combination of its unique code and the id of the coupon it is associated with.

schema.description: The id of a coupon code is a combination of its unique code and the id of the coupon it is associated with.

delete.description:
Deletes a coupon code specified by the given identifier synchronously. If a profile has been assigned to the coupon code, an exception will be raised

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `350/s`
Steady: `3500/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/delete_coupon_code.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of a coupon code is a combination of its unique code and the id of the coupon it is associated with.

schema.description: The id of a coupon code is a combination of its unique code and the id of the coupon it is associated with.

get.summary: Get Bulk Create Coupon Code Jobs
get.description:
Get all coupon code bulk create jobs. Returns a maximum of 100 jobs per request.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_bulk_create_coupon_code_jobs.json)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`status`: `equals`

post.description:
Create a coupon-code-bulk-create-job to bulk create a list of coupon codes. Max number of coupon codes per job we allow for is 1000. Max number of jobs queued at once we allow for is 100.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/bulk_create_coupon_codes.json)

get.summary: Get Bulk Create Coupon Codes Job
get.description:
Get a coupon code bulk create job with the given job ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_bulk_create_coupon_codes_job.json)

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: ID of the job to retrieve.

schema.description: ID of the job to retrieve.

get.description:
Get the coupon associated with a given coupon code ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupons:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_coupon_for_coupon_code.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the coupon to look up the relationship of.

schema.description: The ID of the coupon to look up the relationship of.

get.summary: Get Coupon ID for Coupon Code
get.description:
Gets the coupon relationship associated with the given coupon code id

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupons:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_coupon_id_for_coupon_code.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the coupon to look up the relationship of.

schema.description: The ID of the coupon to look up the relationship of.

get.description:
Gets a list of coupon codes associated with the given coupon id

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_coupon_codes_for_coupon.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the coupon to look up the relationship of.

schema.description: The ID of the coupon to look up the relationship of.

parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#filtering

`status`: `equals`
`coupon.id`: `any`, `equals`

get.summary: Get Coupon Code IDs for Coupon
get.description:
Gets a list of coupon code relationships associated with the given coupon id

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `75/s`
Steady: `750/m` **Scopes:** `coupon-codes:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/stable/apis/get_coupon_code_ids_for_coupon.json)

code.description: A code for classifying the error type.

title.description: A high-level message about the error.

detail.example: The payload provided in the request is invalid.

source.description: Additional information on the source of the error.

coupon-codes.description: Array of coupon codes to create.

id.description: Unique identifier for retrieving the job. Generated by Klaviyo.

created_at.description: The date and time the job was created in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

total_count.description: The total number of operations to be processed by the job. See `completed_count` for the job's current progress.

completed_count.description: The total number of operations that have been completed by the job.

failed_count.description: The total number of operations that have failed as part of the job.

completed_at.description: Date and time the job was completed in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

errors.description: Array of errors encountered during the processing of the job.

expires_at.description: Date and time the job expires in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm).

id.description: IDs of the created coupon codes.

unique_code.description: This is a unique string that will be or is assigned to each customer/profile and is associated with a coupon.

expires_at.description: The datetime when this coupon code will expire. If not specified or set to null, it will be automatically set to 1 year.

id.description: The id of a coupon code is a combination of its unique code and the id of the coupon it is associated with.

status.description: The current status of the coupon code.

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#authentication
